element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Player chooses from 6 protagonists (explorer, pirate, privateer, cartographer, treasure hunter, merchant), each with distinct career objectives
Ali Vezas merchant path; foundation for economic progression
João Franco explorer path; discovering new ports and charting unknown waters
Catalina pirate path, Otto privateer path; defeating merchants and pirates in combat
Pietro treasure hunter path; pursuing inherited family debts and hidden secrets
Ernst von Bohr cartographer path; creating comprehensive world map through exploration
Completing tasks for King of Portugal increases fame and nobility titles
Investing in neutral ports to expand national sphere of influence
Loose narrative structure with required paths; deviating stalls progress
João Franco path culmination; discovering Atlantis secrets
Catalina's vendetta against Franco family; Otto's mission against Spanish Armada

rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Open-ended exploration with episodic tension spikes around career milestones and combat encounters; progression gated by story requirements that balance sandbox freedom with narrative rails

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Neutral ports available for investment and exploration; optional treasure hunt locations; secondary career paths accessible from main progression
spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Lost continent (Atlantis) serves as ultimate discovery goal; hidden family schemes revealed through story progression

difficulty_curve.early_game: Character selection and initial career path tutorials; basic trading and exploration mechanics introduced gently
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Naval combat encounters intensify; economic competition increases; multiple career paths become viable with strategic choices
difficulty_curve.late_game: Political intrigue and character vendetta conflicts (Catalina vs Franco family, Otto vs Spanish Armada); Atlantis discovery challenge; complex story gates requiring specific career progression
notable_spikes: Economic collapse potential when trade routes fail
Late-game story revelation conflicts between protagonist goals

notable_level_patterns.description: Six distinct protagonist paths create different pacing and difficulty curves: explorer (linear discovery), pirate (combat-heavy), privateer (combat+politics), cartographer (exploration-heavy), treasure hunter (quest-heavy), merchant (economic-heavy)
notable_level_patterns.example_level: João Franco explorer path vs Catalina pirate path create fundamentally different game rhythms

notable_level_patterns.description: Each port serves as safe zone for trading, investing, receiving missions, and narrative progression; neutral ports can be claimed for sphere-of-influence expansion
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Portuguese home port vs discovered neutral ports

notable_level_patterns.description: Players choose exploration direction freely but deviating from loose story path stalls narrative progression; creates tension between sandbox freedom and directed quests
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Main story gates blocking Atlantis discovery vs optional treasure hunts
